Description: Question text should be prominent and readable
Do: Large font (18-24px) centered in card with padding
Don't: Small text crammed with other elements

Description: Use clear readable font for questions
Do: Sans-serif body font (Inter Space Grotesk) at 1.5 line-height
Don't: Decorative fonts or tight line spacing for question text

Description: Question text must be highly readable
Do: Light text on dark card (or dark on light) with 7:1+ contrast
Don't: Low contrast text on patterned backgrounds

Do: 32px+ padding inside card generous margin below
Fade or slide-in when new question appears (200-300ms)
Full-width buttons minimum 48px height with 12px gap
Don't: Small inline buttons hard to tap

Do: Column layout with full-width buttons
Don't: Grid layout with tiny buttons on mobile

Description: Clear visual states for each button
Do: Default + hover + selected + correct + incorrect states
Green background + checkmark icon + pulse animation
Red background on selected + green highlight on correct
Don't: No indication of which was correct

Do: Disable all buttons after first selection
Don't: Allow changing answer after seeing feedback

Description: Prefix options with A B C D
Do: Letter prefix helps keyboard users and readability
SVG ring or arc that depletes clockwise

Description: Urgency increases as time runs out

Do: 40-60px ring or bar at top of screen
CSS transition on stroke-dashoffset or width
Pulse animation or flash when <5 seconds
Top of game screen horizontal bar or dots
Don't: Hidden or at bottom of page

Do: Question 3 of 10 text + visual bar
Animated width transition on progress bar
Large centered score with fraction and percentage
Star icons (1-3) based on score threshold

Description: Remind player which category they played
Do: Category name at top of results
Play Again (same cat) + Home + Share buttons
7 correct 3 incorrect out of 10
Confetti or particle effect for 80%+ scores
Cards with icon + name + best score in 2-column grid
Star rating or best score on each category card
Full card clickable with minimum 80px height

Description: Categories look different from each other
Do: Unique color or icon per category
Display for 3-5 seconds or until Next tap
Below question card or in expanded section
Don't: Tiny text or hidden behind interaction

Do: Explain why the answer is correct with context
Show install button when beforeinstallprompt fires
App name + icon + tagline prominently displayed
Fade or slide transitions (200-400ms)
Check prefers-reduced-motion disable animations

Description: Dark themes reduce eye strain during extended play
Do: Dark background with light text as default
Don't: Bright white default for game apps

Description: Use vibrant accents on dark backgrounds
Do: Cyan emerald violet rose accents
Don't: Muted or muddy colors on dark
